name: Mixed Material Bath Wall Cabinet - Brightroom™
description:
Bring space-saving storage and style to your bathroom with this Mixed-Material Bath Wall Cabinet from Brightroom™. Made with a particle board frame, this wall cabinet makes a stunning addition to your bath space. It features a main compartment with double doors to keep toiletries neatly tucked away, plus an open shelf for decorative accents or often-used bath items and even a built-in bar for hanging your towel. Mount this cabinet on empty wall space to create extra storage in your bathroom.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
